title: Set Theory
description: Set notation, operations (union, intersection, complement), Venn diagrams, and De Morgan's laws.

title: Real Numbers, Surds, and Indices
description: Properties of real numbers, rationalization of surds, and laws of indices/logarithms.

title: Equations and Inequalities
description: Solving linear, quadratic, and simultaneous equations, and graphical solutions of inequalities.

title: Polynomials and Partial Fractions
description: Factor/remainder theorems, division of polynomials, and decomposing into partial fractions.

title: Sequences and Series
description: Arithmetic Progression (AP), Geometric Progression (GP), and sum to infinity.

title: Binomial Theorem
description: Permutations, combinations, Pascal's triangle, and binomial expansion for positive integers.

title: Mathematical Induction
description: The principle of mathematical induction and its application in proving algebraic statements.

title: Complex Numbers
description: Algebra of complex numbers, Argand diagrams, and polar/exponential forms.

title: Trigonometry
description: Trigonometric ratios, circular measure, identities, compound angles, and solving trigonometric equations.
